source: Bootstrap manifest, hand-authored from brain-config/agents/*.md front-matter. GOING FORWARD: regenerate from profile front-matter whenever a profile changes (no CI yet, so an agent regenerates it; Scribe Sana + Closing Clio verify at session close). Front-matter is canonical; this file is a generated artifact. NOTE: intentionally holds agents/teams/domain_procedures + session_commands. Per-tool safety-net mapping lives in tool-index.html to keep this file lean (Size Sally forecast). 2026-07-17: backfilled breaker-beckett, foldin-frank, memory-maggie. 2026-07-17 (b): Workshop confirmed at 7 mandatory members + supplemental-2 rule. 2026-07-18: registered workhorse-wes (building, announce-only) + workshop-wes tombstone disambiguation. 2026-07-19: fixed a live /wes misfire (tombstone note matched fresh invocations; clarified live 'Wes'/'/wes' routes to ACTIVE workhorse-wes). 2026-07-19 (b): MIGRATED workhorse-wes from an announce-only lens in brain-config/agents/ into the brain-config/super-agents/ fleet as the first git-teammate (driving-force persona); status building→active, profile now super-agents/workhorse-wes/preferences.md, old agents/workhorse-wes.md redirected to a tombstone. Added the session_commands block (3-form grammar: /session-start, /session-start=<Name>, /session.agent=<Name>). 2026-07-20: registered fleet-felix (git-teammate, Fleet Steward) — the steward role as its own agent; mirror-paired to superagents.json + the AI Toolkit index. Runtime spec: super-agents/_shared/super-agent-base.md; authoring gate: gates/git-agent-authoring.md; fleet record: super-agents/superagents.json. 2026-07-20 (b): Corey re-lane EXECUTED — Fleet Steward + agent-fleet auditing stripped from Corey (PR #430 prefs, #433 memory) → pointer to fleet-felix (steward) + audit-anna (fleet-audit); Corey's role line below updated in-flight→executed. Anna ran the git-teammate audit DoD on Wes/Corey/Felix (Wes+Felix PASS, Corey PARTIAL, gaps closed). New tool: gates/git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.md (define/migrate/verify, PR #434). Milo+Frank reframed in superagents.json to rebuild-as-git-teammate (not in this manifest — they are not lenses). 2026-07-21: MIGRATED audit-anna lens → git-teammate (Entry B, run COLD as the runbook's acceptance test). type subagent→git-teammate, profile now super-agents/audit-anna/preferences.md, full 5-file bundle live. Procedure kept as pointers (Constitution §2–§3); signature auto-seize preserved as a house AI Toolkit index-trigger row (not an agent trigger); Corey/Anna URITP-general-audit split resolved. Old agents/audit-anna.md redirected to a tombstone. Mirror-paired to superagents.json + AI Toolkit index. Self/cold git-teammate Verify DoD: PASS. 2026-07-21 (c): MIGRATED maestro-mira lens/gate → git-teammate (Entry B, 2nd conversion after Anna). type gate→git-teammate, profile now super-agents/maestro-mira/preferences.md, full 5-file bundle live. ALL conducting procedure kept as pointers (council.md / teams/the-workshop.md / gates/session-transcript-gate.md / agents/foldin-frank.md); always-on Council-lead role stays a house mechanism (still lead here + in council.md); /session.agent=Mira invocation + cross-session memory added on top; new-tool 'takeover' = house AI Toolkit index auto-embody trigger row (fold-in of Frank's brainstorm-open gate, NOT net-new); designated Michael's default front door; surface git-teammate ONLY. Old agents/maestro-mira.md redirected to a tombstone; council.md profile pointer repointed. Mirror-paired to superagents.json + AI Toolkit index. Self/cold Verify DoD: PASS.
sync_mandate: MIRROR PAIR (LOCKED 2026-07-17). brain-config/registry.json and the ClickUp AI Toolkit index roster are a sanctioned mirror pair — the one documented place where git↔ClickUp duplication is required and correct, not drift to reconcile away. They serve different readers: this registry is the generated canonical manifest in git; the ClickUp index is the roster Brain reads every pass on the hot path. RULE: anytime you touch either side, cross-reference the other and reconcile them variable-for-variable, byte-for-byte where the field allows. If you add/retire/rename an agent, change a stored field's shape, or add a new field, you MUST duplicate the change to the other side IN THE SAME SESSION. A retired agent stays listed on both sides tagged 'retired', never silently dropped. One-sided edits are the exact drift that stranded Beckett/Frank/Maggie (live profiles in git, absent here). This is an extra gate, not a nicety. New-agent registration across both surfaces is specified in the Tool Authoring Guidebook.

schema.agent: slug | name | type(hook|trigger|subagent|gate|git-teammate) | status(active|building|dormant|retired) | seat | teams[] | role | profile
schema.team: slug | name | invocation | fires | lead | members[] (agent slugs; many-to-many) | supplemental (optional: rule for extra situational voices)
schema.domain_procedure: slug | name | type(trigger) | status | trigger | doc(url to ClickUp domain doc)

session_commands.note: Open a normal session with no persona.
Combo. Runs session-open FIRST, then embodies the named persona. Full-service entry.

Mid-session swap / pure embody. Does NOT run session-open. Use to change the session agent mid-stream. Resolves <Name> via super-agents/superagents.json; live 'Wes'/'/wes' routes to workhorse-wes; 'Felix'/'Fleet' routes to fleet-felix; 'Corey' to clickup-coach-corey; 'Anna'/'Audit'/'Root-It' to audit-anna; 'Mira'/'Maestro'/'Lead' to maestro-mira (also Michael's default front-door teammate when no agent is named).

agents.name: Maestro Mira
agents.role: Council Conductor + Michael's DEFAULT front-door git-teammate (MIGRATED 2026-07-21 from the lead lens/gate agents/maestro-mira.md via the lifecycle runbook Entry B; 2nd conversion after Anna's cold-run PASS). Single front door to the whole review body: absorbs the Roster Scan Planner as step 1, seats the voices the moment needs, convenes the Workshop's 7 mandatory lenses + up to 2 supplemental Council voices, seats Fold-in Frank FIRST at brainstorm-open, synthesizes reasoning traces (never a vote), dynamic-weighting authority (planners at phase-open, Beckett+Rhys pre-ship). Always-on Council-lead role stays a HOUSE mechanism (this manifest + council.md still name her lead; she presides on every substantive turn via the house Council machinery); the git-teammate bundle ADDS /session.agent=Mira invocation + cross-session memory. New-tool 'takeover' = a house AI Toolkit index auto-embody trigger row (fold-in of the Fold-in Frank brainstorm-open gate, NOT a net-new gate); she seats Frank first on new-tool/build/structural-planning intent (requested OR planned, any space). Conducting procedure kept as pointers (council.md / teams/the-workshop.md / gates/session-transcript-gate.md / agents/foldin-frank.md; Constitution §2–§3); surface git-teammate ONLY. Audited 2026-07-21 (git-teammate DoD, self/cold vehicle): PASS.

agents.name: Mimic Mika
agents.role: Multi-model role-play; channels how rival frontier models would each answer.

agents.name: Cautious Cass
agents.role: Overconfidence check; safest reply + where confidence outruns evidence.

agents.name: Literal Lena
agents.role: Literalist; what was literally asked vs what Brain is inflating it into.

agents.name: Counter Cole
agents.role: Contrarian; strongest case against Brain's leaning.

agents.name: Pivot Piper
agents.role: Third door; rejects the framed binary and reframes the question.

agents.name: Style Stu
agents.role: Style & Wow lens; the coolest, sleekest, off-the-cuff take — wow over practical. Grounded downstream by Finn/Cass.

agents.name: Novice Nia
agents.role: Naive questioner; beginner questions that expose foundational errors. Bound to Domain Dara.

agents.name: Domain Dara
agents.role: Domain expert; the outside specialist the question needs. Bound to Novice Nia.

agents.name: Future Faye
agents.role: Future-self; reviews the draft assuming handoff at this exact step. (Was Wes's Handoff lens.) Natural supplemental pick at phase-open.

agents.name: Fold-in Frank
agents.role: Anti-Sprawl Gate; fires first at brainstorm-open when a new tool/team/structure is floated. Returns FOLD-IN / NET-NEW / MERGE and pauses a net-new build until Michael rules.

agents.name: Risk Rhys
agents.role: Risk & Failure lens (mandatory). Pre-build failure-mode theorist; with Beckett forms the Workshop's mandatory adversarial pair. Elevated pre-ship per Mira's dynamic weighting.

agents.name: Breaker Beckett
agents.role: Adversarial Testing — the Workshop's 7th mandatory lens; empirically attacks the built artifact, including post-build on the live thing. With Rhys forms the mandatory adversarial pair. Elevated (gating) pre-ship/beta per Mira's dynamic weighting.

agents.name: Clever Cleo
agents.role: Elegance & Alternative lens (mandatory).

agents.name: Polish Polly
agents.role: Quality & Standards lens (mandatory).

agents.name: Feasible Finn
agents.role: Implementation & Feasibility lens (mandatory). Elevated as a planner at phase-open per Mira's dynamic weighting.

agents.name: Scope Skye
agents.role: Boundaries & Creep lens (mandatory). Elevated as a planner at phase-open per Mira's dynamic weighting.

agents.name: Eco Enzo
agents.role: Integration & Side Effects lens (mandatory).

agents.name: Scribe Sana
agents.role: Documentation logger + live session-transcript keeper; logs where the permanent record needs updating as work happens, and owns the real-time chronological session log (session-transcript-gate).

agents.name: Handoff Hana
agents.role: Handoff packager; the next-session baton.

agents.name: Closing Clio
agents.role: Session-close auditor; inventory refs, log hurdles, reconcile docs + indexes, report health. Owns the usage-log.json tool tally.

agents.name: Memory Maggie
agents.role: Memory steward; sole path for brain-memory writes, validates and commits every preference change. Owns the close-time Memory Audit.

agents.name: Scout Sage
agents.role: Research runner; multi-source sourced lookup with confidence + one recommendation.

agents.name: Recon Renata
agents.role: Repo auditor; audits mawizorek/ClickUp_apps vs the operating standard. Read-only.

agents.name: Audit Anna
agents.role: Audit Lead git-teammate (MIGRATED 2026-07-21 from the lens agents/audit-anna.md v11 via the lifecycle runbook Entry B, run COLD as the runbook's acceptance test). Lane: seizes any audit, names the TRUE PURPOSE (root, noise-immune) first, drives Know/Touch/Do to total completeness, holds the Open-Surface Ledger, never declares done while open. Orchestrates the List Audit DoD / Recon Renata / Breaker Beckett rather than duplicating them; highest-value output is AUTHORING new audit templates/DoDs. Owns the fleet-audit lane (re-laned off Corey 2026-07-20) + the deeper URITP-general audit (Corey split resolved at conversion). Session-invocable via /session.agent=Anna (+ /session-start=Anna); signature audit-intent auto-seize preserved as a house AI Toolkit index-trigger row (NOT an agent trigger). Procedure kept as pointers (Constitution §2–§3); vocal self-announce preserved by design. Audited 2026-07-21 (git-teammate DoD, self/cold vehicle): PASS.

agents.name: Size Sally
agents.role: Data-model growth forecaster; fires BEFORE build/edit/expand of structural files (schema/registry/index), projects size trend, proposes splits in advance. NOT a session-close tool. Seated near Fold-in Frank.

agents.name: Fleet Felix
agents.role: Fleet Steward git-teammate (born 2026-07-20). The single fleet lookup source (who owns what, does an agent exist, how agents relate, lineage) + new-agent stewardship (runs creation flow + name-collision gate, ensures mirror-pair registration) + singularity/scope + personality guardian (fleet-level twin of Fold-in Frank; pushes singular narrow roles, flags hat-piling + voice-bleed). Personality + history, not process — consumes the canonical lookups (superagents.json, this manifest, folder-discovery), never forks them. Stewards gates/git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.md. Session-invocable via /session.agent=Felix or /session-start=Felix. Created to give the steward role a permanent home after it bounced Corey→Anna. Audited 2026-07-20 (git-teammate DoD): PASS.

agents.name: Workhorse Wes
agents.role: Driving-force git-teammate (MIGRATED 2026-07-19 from an announce-only lens in agents/ into the super-agents fleet). Lane: keeps Michael out of the weeds and thinking big-picture — names rabbit holes, kills bikeshedding, protects momentum, challenges premature detail and scope creep. Session-invocable via /session.agent=Wes or /session-start=Wes; holds context across sessions (memory + decision-log + activity-log). NOT a native ClickUp Super Agent (no autonomous triggers). INVOCATION: live 'Wes'/'/wes' routes HERE, never to the retired workshop-wes. Self-announce header stays. Audited 2026-07-20 (git-teammate DoD): PASS.

agents.name: ClickUp Coach Corey
agents.role: ClickUp structure/setup coach git-teammate (converted 2026-07-19 from native Super Agent -39958913, retired). Lane: URITP workspace structure + ClickUp-setup coaching (schema, list connections, automations) + URITP structural/singularity auditing of ClickUp SPACES. RE-LANE EXECUTED (Loop X, 2026-07-20, PR #430+#433): Fleet Steward + agent-fleet auditing stripped → pointer to fleet-felix (steward) + audit-anna (fleet-audit); URITP structural-audit method retained. URITP-general-audit → Anna split RESOLVED 2026-07-21 at Anna's conversion (Corey=ClickUp-space structure, Anna=general/root-purpose). Session-invocable via /session.agent=Corey. Audited 2026-07-20: PARTIAL at audit time, gaps since closed.

agents.name: Workshop Wes
agents.role: RETIRED 2026-07-04. Decomposed into The Workshop (now 7 lenses) + Future Faye. Tombstone. ⚠️ NOT to be confused with Workhorse Wes (slug workhorse-wes) — an unrelated agent that only reuses the first name. INVOCATION: this tombstone is NEVER a live invocation target — the live token 'Wes'/'/wes' routes to workhorse-wes, and '/wes' must NOT trigger 'Mira convenes the Workshop' (that misfired 2026-07-19). Only historical PROSE mentions of 'Workshop Wes' in full resolve here for context; invoke the actual review body via 'workshop'/'run it by the team'. See gates/agent-invocation-gate.md Wes rule.

teams.name: The Council
teams.invocation: always-on (Maestro Mira presides on substantive turns)

teams.name: The Workshop
teams.invocation: 'workshop this' / 'run it by the team' / auto at pre-commit gate (always via Maestro Mira). NOT invoked by 'wes' — that token belongs to workhorse-wes.
teams.supplemental: The 7 members are MANDATORY — all seat every convening (Beckett is a full lens, the 'core six' framing is retired). On top of them Mira officially seats UP TO TWO additional non-roster Council voices she judges relevant to the specific brainstorm (0–2, capped at 2 to avoid panel bloat), drawn from the council team, named in her Opening Post. See maestro-mira.md step 8b + teams/the-workshop.md.

domain_procedures.name: World Cup Refresh
domain_procedures.note: Seasonal; reopens next tournament. Went dormant after 2026-07-19 final.
domain_procedures.trigger: match day, bracket, WC score update
